title: Cost of Equity: Which of the following is NOT a method to estimate...
summary: Calculate the weighted average cost of capital or cost of equity using CAPM and capital structure data.
prompt: Which of the following is NOT a method to estimate the cost of equity?

options.text: The Weighted Average Cost of Capital (WACC) is a broader metric that includes

solution: The Weighted Average Cost of Capital (WACC) is a broader metric that includes both cost of debt and cost of equity, while the other options are specific methods for estimating the cost of equity.
